input.query: Assess onboarding for a UAE healthcare analytics vendor that will process patient operations data and integrate with Microsoft 365.

case.service_description: Healthcare analytics dashboard for operational reporting using de-identified and limited patient operations data.

evidence.title: Executed data processing addendum
evidence.text: Signed DPA covers patient-data processing, subprocessors, breach notification, retention, deletion assistance, and UAE cross-border transfer review before production.

evidence.title: SOC 2 and ISO 27001 evidence summary
evidence.text: Vendor provided current SOC 2 Type II bridge letter, ISO 27001 certificate, MFA, SSO, encryption, audit logging, vulnerability management, and annual penetration testing summary.

evidence.title: Continuity evidence
evidence.text: Business continuity plan lists recovery contacts, disaster recovery test date, backup procedures, and exit assistance for analytics configuration export.
